description:
Analyze the TCP capture file '200722_tcp_anon.pcapng' located in ~/Documents/captures/ for flow control statistics. Create a report file at ~/Documents/captures/flow_control_report.txt containing metrics for total packets, TCP zero window events, TCP window update events, TCP window full events, max TCP window size (raw value), min non-zero TCP window size (raw value), unique TCP conversations, and SYN packets with window scale option.

Format the report exactly as follows:

TCP Flow Control Analysis Report
================================
Capture File: 200722_tcp_anon.pcapng
Total Packets: <number>
TCP Zero Window Events: <number>
TCP Window Update Events: <number>
TCP Window Full Events: <number>
Max TCP Window Size: <number>
Min Non-Zero TCP Window Size: <number>
Unique TCP Conversations: <number>
SYN Packets with Window Scale Option: <number>
